Around [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]] the eldest son of [[Deej Warrick]], [[Weechee Warrick|Weechee]], was given the sacred '''Red Wings of Courage''' by [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Shaman/Legends|medicine man]] [[Logray/Legends|Logray]] when Weechee set off from [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] with his father, brothers, and the [[Human/Legends|Humans]] [[Cindel Towani|Cindel]] and [[Mace Towani]] in order to rescue the Towanis' parents from a [[Gorax/Legends|Gorax]]. The wings comprised a headband with tufts of red feathers on each side. The Red Wings of Courage had once belonged to an ancient and brave Ewok warrior.

==Appearances==
*''[[Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure]]''
